summary: Comprehensive testing of Global Markets Bloomberg-like Terminal. Backend APIs: 100% pass (22/22 tests). Frontend: All widgets working. Technical Analysis, Impact Score, Region filters all functional.

minor.issue: Slow response time due to sequential Yahoo Finance API calls

integration_issues.issue: Takes 10-30 seconds to fully load due to multiple API calls (quote, history, supply chain, technical, impact)

issues: HTML hydration warning: span inside tbody - cosmetic only, no functional impact

passed_tests: API /api/screener with region=Europe - Returns European stocks only
API /api/screener with region=Asia - Returns Asian stocks only
API /api/screener with region=US - Returns US stocks only
API /api/screener with sector filter - Works correctly
API /api/market/technical/{symbol} - Returns RSI, MACD, SMA, Bollinger Bands, signal, trend
Dashboard - Global Markets Overview displays US, Europe, Asia indices
Dashboard - S&P 500, CAC 40, Nikkei indices displayed
Dashboard - Watchlist, Market Movers, Breaking News, Geopolitical Alerts widgets working
Screener - Region filter dropdown shows All Regions, US, Europe, Asia
Screener - Asset type tabs (Stocks, Indices, Commodities, Forex) work
Quote page - Technical Analysis widget shows RSI, MACD, SMA 20, SMA 50, Bollinger Bands
Quote page - Signal (BUY/SELL/HOLD) and Trend indicators displayed
Quote page - Impact Score widget shows score (62), risk_level (HIGH), factors
Quote page - Supply Chain widget with suppliers/customers tabs
Quote page - Price chart with period buttons (1D, 5D, 1M, 3M, 1Y, 5Y)
critical_code_review_comments: HTML hydration warning in Dashboard watchlist table (span inside tbody) - cosmetic only

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all features working with minor loading delay)

seed_data_creation: TEST_MSFT added and removed during watchlist CRUD test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (global stock coverage, technical indicators, impact score, region filters) tested and working. Yahoo Finance API calls can be slow, allow 10-30 seconds for Quote page to fully load. Supply chain data is MOCKED but enhanced with more realistic data.

mocked_apis_list: /api/supplychain/{symbol} - Enhanced mock data with suppliers and customers

features_verified.technical_indicators: RSI, MACD, SMA, Bollinger Bands, Signal, Trend - VERIFIED
features_verified.region_filters: US, Europe, Asia filters in screener - VERIFIED
